summary: Pod create 502 Bad Gateway + missing controlnet_aux at install, surfaced while renting a Pod for sampler tests.
Root cause: new MpiNodes unreleased, wrapper node_lock pin pulls old pack -> nodes missing on Pod. Fix = MpiNodes release + node_lock bump. Create-502 hardening is secondary.
Correction: MpiNodes pack IS on Pod; only a few NEW image-processing nodes from a recent pack update are missing (Pod pin predates them). Fix = release + node_lock bump. User doing the release now.
